message:
refactor: update runtime code to use spec.tools instead of spec.capabilities

validateConstraints and primitivesForAgent now accept `tools` (primitive
names only) instead of `capabilities` (combined tools + agent refs).
Call sites in agent.ts updated accordingly. Backward-compat fallback
paths that iterate capabilities for agent name resolution are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
